Values: Should be a file name listed in the configuration ``atlite: cutouts:`` (e.g. 'europe-2013-era5')
Description: reference an existing folder in the directory ``cutouts``
column5: or set as `auto` which redirects to the cutout configuration `atlite: default:`. Source module must be ERA5.
column6: Specifies the directory where the relevant weather data is stored.

Description: Specifies the Atlite method to calculate renewable potential.
Specifies the file location for hydrobasins. They are used to make the runoff calibration, defining a polygon to compute the available water surface using a surface integral.

Specifies the types of hydro power plants to build per-unit availability time series for. 'ror' stands for run-of-river plants, 'PHS' represents pumped-hydro storage, and 'hydro' stands for hydroelectric dams.

Maximum state of charge capacity of the pumped-hydro storage (PHS) in terms of hours at full output capacity ``p_nom``. Cf. `PyPSA documentation <https://pypsa.readthedocs.io/en/latest/components.html#storage-unit>`_.

Maximum state of charge capacity of the pumped-hydro storage (PHS) in terms of hours at full output capacity ``p_nom`` or heuristically determined. Cf. `PyPSA documentation <https://pypsa.readthedocs.io/en/latest/components.html#storage-unit>`_.
(optional, default 6) Default value of max_hours for hydro plants with missing values
To avoid too small values in the inflow time series, values below this threshold are set to zero.
True: In nodes where there is no hydro generation, adds a zero-capacity hydro generator so that hydro is considered for capacity expansion. It is done in the ``add_electricity`` rule.
When specified, it describes how to normalize hydro time series to adhere to national statistics
Data source used to rescale the hydro runoff; option 'hydro_capacities' to use the provided 'data/hydro_capacities.csv', 'eia' or 'irena' for using the eia or irena file
(optional) Specify the desired year to be used for normalization, the default value corresponds to the cutout weather year
Multiplier factor of the rescaling process (default 1.0)

Minimum energy-to-capacity ratio used to classify hydropower plants with missing technology information: values above this threshold are treated as reservoir plants, while smaller values are classified as run-of-river.
